Grid.TextBlock:
EXECUTION MESSAGE
Our successful commerce-raiding in the South Atlantic is forcing NATO to divert their ships and aircraft to look for us. This greatly assists our Comrades in the North Atlantic as they attack the NATO convoys.
HQ has informed us that NATO merchants are sheltering at Port Louis, Mauritius. A rapid strike against it offers the opportunity to inflict additional disruption before NATO can organize itself.
Attachment (A) provides further information on the NATO vessels currently at Port Louis. Positive identification of these vessels is required and civilian casualties cannot be tolerated. We will approach under cover of darkness and attack at first light, when our air units may assist.
Our spies inform us that NATO is assisted only by Pakistan and South Africa in this region, whose Mirage fighters are now based at Reunion. However, a further message indicates a small U.S. Navy task force is operating somewhere nearby. We will avoid them if we can and destroy them if we must.
Our task is to raid the harbor and destroy all enemies encountered. After this action, we will meet our resupply force in the far south. Good luck, Comrades.
END OF MESSAGE
/s/ Markov
Cовершенно cекретно
После прочтения — уничтожить
---
ATTACHMENT (A)
Target vessels at Port Louis as follows. Intelligence assesses at least one NATO escort of GARCIA or BROOKE class directly attached.
• SS AMERICAN ALLIANCE - LANCER-class container vessel
• SS PRESIDENT VAN BUREN - Improved C4 type break-bulk cargo vessel
• SS CAPE ARCHWAY AK-5011 - C4 class break-bulk cargo vessel
